identity: Human female sorcerer, sharp intelligent adult female face, short neatly-styled raven-black hair in a sleek chin-length bob, glowing violet eyes, fair pale skin, slim athletic build.
outfit: Deep indigo-purple robe with silver-trimmed hood worn down and silver arcane sigils embroidered along the front seam and hem, a silver clasp at the throat, a thin black belt with a violet gemstone buckle. Dark leather boots.
weapons: A slender dark polished wooden staff topped with a faceted violet crystal orb glowing softly, held in the right hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Right hand thrust forward, crystal orb in front projecting a concentrated beam of violet arcane energy outward. CRITICAL: character must be MID-STRIKE, clearly in motion — weapon in the middle of a swing, thrust, shot, or spell-cast, NOT an idle/battle-ready stance. Pose must be visually distinct from the east idle.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both hands raised, the violet crystal orb rising between them surrounded by a swirling arcane circle of gold runes.
blockStyle: East-facing. Crystal orb floats in front, projecting a translucent violet hex-dome shield forward.
koStyle: East-facing, slumped on one knee, crystal orb fallen beside him, pendant lying on the ground, robes splayed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), composed mystic idle. Crystal orb hovering above the right palm held at chest level. Violet eye-glow.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Raven hair, glowing violet eyes, amethyst pendant, violet shoulder cape, gold-embroidered robes.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female sorcerer, sharp intelligent adult female face, short neatly-styled raven-black hair in a sleek chin-length bob, glowing violet eyes, fair pale skin, slim athletic build.

OUTFIT: Deep indigo-purple robe with silver-trimmed hood worn down and silver arcane sigils embroidered along the front seam and hem, a silver clasp at the throat, a thin black belt with a violet gemstone buckle. Dark leather boots.

WEAPONS: A slender dark polished wooden staff topped with a faceted violet crystal orb glowing softly, held in the right hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female sorcerer, sharp intelligent adult female face, short neatly-styled raven-black hair in a sleek chin-length bob, glowing violet eyes, fair pale skin, slim athletic build.

OUTFIT: Deep indigo-purple robe with silver-trimmed hood worn down and silver arcane sigils embroidered along the front seam and hem, a silver clasp at the throat, a thin black belt with a violet gemstone buckle. Dark leather boots.

WEAPONS: A slender dark polished wooden staff topped with a faceted violet crystal orb glowing softly, held in the right hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Raven hair, glowing violet eyes, amethyst pendant, violet shoulder cape, gold-embroidered robes.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
